stemHtml:
What words must be used to complete the statement below?

A wing contaminated with ice, will typically stall at(1) _____ Angle Of Attack (AOA) and at (2) _____ airspeed, with small amounts of ice having already an effect, whereby the effect (3) ____ if the ice is rough.

options.a: 1. a lower 2. a higher 3. is greater
options.b: 1. a lower 2. a lower 3. is greater
options.c: 1. a higher 2. a higher 3. is greater
options.d: 1. a higher 2. a lower 3. is greater
